findings.issue: Build step will fail early due to pipefail, bypassing custom log assertion
findings.citation: .github/workflows/remote-hive-build.yml:74 — (cd crates/remote && docker compose --env-file .env.remote build --no-cache remote-server 2>&1 | tee /tmp/ci-build.log)
findings.remediation: (cd crates/remote && docker compose --env-file .env.remote build --no-cache remote-server 2>&1 | tee /tmp/ci-build.log) || true
